ec2.spotfleet.memorygibpervcpurequest.Cf: The minimum and maximum amount of memory per vCPU, in GiB.

ec2.spotfleet.memorygibpervcpurequest.Ma.Description: The maximum amount of memory per vCPU, in GiB. To specify no maximum limit, omit this parameter.

ec2.spotfleet.memorygibpervcpurequest.Mi.Description: The minimum amount of memory per vCPU, in GiB. To specify no minimum limit, omit this parameter.
